scripts.test:receipt-regression: vitest run src/receipt.test.ts src/draftReceipt.test.ts src/printer/printerMachine.test.ts src/soft-machine/persistence.test.ts src/mobile-instrument/deriveMobileScene.test.ts
scripts.test:three-endings-hardening: VITE_THREE_ENDINGS=true playwright test tests/e2e/three-endings-foundation.spec.ts tests/e2e/keep-receipt.spec.ts tests/e2e/release-receipt.spec.ts tests/e2e/carry-designation.spec.ts tests/e2e/carry-forward-ritual.spec.ts tests/e2e/carry-forward-in-tree.spec.ts tests/e2e/three-endings-hardening.spec.ts tests/e2e/three-endings-history.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.release:carry-forward: npm run typecheck && npm run test:carry-forward && npm run evals:carry-forward && npm run test:receipt-regression && npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/carry-forward.spec.ts tests/e2e/carry-forward-accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/carry-forward-viewports.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop && npm run test:carry-forward:in-tree
scripts.release:three-endings:flagged: npm run release:carry-forward && npm run test:three-endings-hardening
scripts.mobile-quality: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:accessibility && npm run test:viewports && npm run test:visual
